assertions.assertion: Includes updating TargetFramework to net10.0 as a first step
assertions.rationale: Without v8-specific knowledge, an LLM would not know v8 requires .NET 10.
The IClock to TimeProvider migration is Duende v8-specific.

assertions.assertion: Includes adding CancellationToken to all async store/service methods
assertions.rationale: The CancellationToken addition across all interfaces is a v8-specific breaking change.
Running EF migrations during a major version upgrade is a general best practice.

assertions.assertion: Lists at least 8 distinct migration steps
assertions.rationale: Without specific v8 knowledge, an LLM would only provide generic upgrade steps (update packages, run migrations, test).
